_publications._publicationTitle: Single-cell multiomics identifies clinically relevant mesenchymal stem-like cells and key regulators for MPNST malignancy.
_publications._context: NF1-associated MPNST cells (sNF96.2, ATCC; MPNST642, MD Anderson; T265, A. Harder) | STS26T and T265 cells were routinely maintained in DMEM high-glucose medium...NF1(+/+) and NF1(-/-) MPNST cell lines | MPNST cell lines (STS-26T, S462, S462TY, T265) were obtained from Dr. David Largaespada's laboratory | Human MPNST cell lines (S462, T265, and NSF1) were analyzed and have been described in detail in our previous studies | Human MPNST cell lines S462 and T265 were described previously...S462 but not T265 cells form solid subcutaneous tumors | human MPNST cell lines (ST88-14, STS26T, S462, S462-TY, and T265) were cultured in complete media | The MPNST cell lines STS26T, T265, and ST8814 have been reported before and were gifted by Dr. Nancy Ratner

_publications._publicationTitle: Discovery of a small molecule targeting IRA2 deletion in budding yeast and neurofibromin loss in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.
